Name: Canadian International School
Tagline: Children are given new opportunities to explore, discover and grow together while developing their unique capabilities and love for learning. Children are…
About: Our Open Houses are the perfect opportunity to learn about Canadian International School. We invite you to spend a morning with us at our world-class campus and experience first-hand our warm and welcoming community.
Philosophy: Coming from a British curriculum background, we were keen to explore the IB approach and wanted a school with strong academics, a close-knit community, excellent technology integration, and open communication. CIS delivers on all of this.
Outcomes: At the Canadian International School (CIS), outdoor learning is an integral part of our holistic approach to education. We believe that some of the most powerful learning experiences happen outside the classroom.
Admissions: If you are unable to make one of our Open House dates please do book an individual tour with one of our Admissions Consultants here.
Quote: Ignite curiosity, embrace diversity, and nurture lifelong learners in a vibrant global community.

Performance.Competitive Pathway: Through SSA affiliation, swimmers who achieve qualifying times gain opportunities to compete in national and international events recognised by World Aquatics. This pathway supports motivated athletes who wish to pursue advanced competition, achieve ranking benchmarks and looking towards college/university swimming.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Whether a student is trying a sport for the first time or training toward competitive excellence, CIS provides opportunities, coaching and encouragement to help them progress.
Performance.Academic Integration: At the Canadian International School (CIS), the arts are integral to school life. Our vibrant Arts programme encourages students to express themselves, develop creativity, and explore their identity through a wide range of artistic disciplines.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Over the course of the morning you will hear from our Head of School or Senior Leadership team and see classes in action as you take a tour with our Principals.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Teachers at Canadian International School hold IB-specific certifications and have extensive experience in international education, ensuring a high-quality learning environment. They are adept at integrating technology into their teaching to enhance student engagement.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Canadian International School provides robust pastoral care through dedicated counsellors and a supportive community, fostering students' mental and emotional health. Regular wellbeing programs and activities promote a balanced lifestyle for all students.
